_comment: Example SPAWNER_PROFILES catalogue. Copy to the path SPAWNER_PROFILES points at (e.g. /state/profiles.json) and edit. These profiles are added ON TOP OF the built-in 'default' profile, which is seeded from the flat SPAWNER_SANDBOX_* env vars and mounts the server's HOME. Paths are HOST paths (sandbox turns drive rootless podman on the host). Templating ({{.Var}}) is not wired yet, so use literal paths for now. Adjust /home/you and the claude/codex mounts to your host layout.
